title: streblus zeylanicus
intro: Streblus zeylanicus, also known as the Indian fig or Nigritella, is a tropical plant species belonging to the mulberry family (Moraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its rich content of flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Streblus zeylanicus include its potential to reduce inflammation, exhibit antioxidant activity, and possibly aid in the management of diabetes and hypertension. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
